entries.definition:
كتاب الجيم

جدل

(جدث) الجيم والدال والثاء كلمةٌ واحدة: الجَدَث القَبْر، وجمعه أجداث.

j–d–th (a doubtful verbal root) a grave, to make or prepare a grave. Of this root, only أَجْدَاث ʾajdāth occurs three times in the Qurʾan.
أَجْدَاث ʾajdāth [pl. of n. جَدَث jadath] graves (54:7) خُشَّعًا أَبْصَارُهُمْ يَخْرُجُونَ مِنَ الْأَجْدَاثِ كَأَنَّهُمْ جَرَادٌ مُّنتَشِرٌ [with] their eyes downcast they emerge from the graves, as if they were locusts, fanning out.
entries.definition_english:
j–d–th (a doubtful verbal root) a grave, to make or prepare a grave. Of this root, only أَجْدَاث ʾajdāth occurs three times in the Qurʾan.
أَجْدَاث ʾajdāth [pl. of n. جَدَث jadath] graves (54:7) خُشَّعًا أَبْصَارُهُمْ يَخْرُجُونَ مِنَ الْأَجْدَاثِ كَأَنَّهُمْ جَرَادٌ مُّنتَشِرٌ [with] their eyes downcast they emerge from the graves, as if they were locusts, fanning out.
